_comment_recall_config: This file is the single source of truth for the two recall knobs:
1. api_request_limit — number of results requested from the search
API on every call. Forwarded as `limit` in the request body of
2. cutoffs / headline_cutoff — the hits@K values the scorer reports.
api_request_limit must align with the caller-facing maximum enforced
by the public search API at https://api.trustfoundry.ai. The current
cap is 25 (see the request schema docs at https://api.trustfoundry.ai).
Raising api_request_limit above that cap will cause every run to fail
The runner refuses to start unless
Otherwise hits@K for K > api_request_limit is meaningless — the API
would never return enough results to satisfy it.
